## Notes for AI Reviewers

### Gemini

Please verify this PR against the target ticket and related docs.

Focus on:

- Ticket scope
- API behavior
- Business rules
- ERD/data model consistency
- Backend responsibility
- Required tests
- Ownership/security requirements

Do not review subjective code style.

### Claude

Please review this PR for:

- Code quality
- Architecture
- Security
- Transaction boundaries
- Error handling
- Test quality
- Maintainability
- Performance
- Operational risk

Do not repeat the full specification review unless necessary.
